message: Pipeline completed for migration-1: 661 passed, 1 skipped. Fixed 4 test failures in test_satiation_deceleration_calibrator.py (wrong constant) and test_restore_subjective_values.py (missing consumer lifecycle accounting). No production code changes.
Pipeline started for migration-2: DDL consolidation — eliminate dual DDL for jobs/job_templates tables, make tables.py the single source of truth.

Pipeline completed for migration-2: 672 passed, 1 skipped. Removed inline DDL from job_manager.py (ensure_jobs_table, ensure_job_templates_table now import from statesim.schema.tables). Added 11 tests in test_ddl_single_source.py. Verified LinkML alignment, regenerated Pydantic models, updated DATA_DICTIONARY_BEFORE.md.
Pipeline started for cleanup-2: Cleanup checkpoint after Phase 2 — evaluate tests, lint, docs; apply limited incremental refactoring.

Evaluation complete: 672 passed, 1 skipped. No eval() violations, no syntax errors. Identified 3 safe refactoring items: .gitignore missing Python patterns, redundant ensure_*_table calls in init_workspace._create_schema_tables, typing.List in tables.py.

Pipeline completed for cleanup-2: 672 passed, 1 skipped (unchanged). Applied 3 refactoring items: (1) Added Python standard ignores to .gitignore (__pycache__/, *.pyc, .pytest_cache/); (2) Removed redundant ensure_jobs_table/ensure_job_templates_table calls from init_workspace._create_schema_tables since create_all_tables already creates these; (3) Modernized typing.List to built-in list in tables.py. All tests green after changes.

Pipeline started for migration-3: Timestamp + naming normalization — rename sectors.created_date/last_updated_date to created_at/updated_at, people.firm_partition to partition, add wage_reductions.updated_at, fix demographic_reports.created_at NOT NULL.

Pipeline completed for migration-3: 672 passed, 1 skipped. All DDL, LinkML schema, Pydantic models, migrations, init_workspace, conftest, job templates, test files, and source files already updated from prior sessions. Updated DATA_DICTIONARY_BEFORE.md to reflect new column names (sectors: created_at/updated_at, people: partition, wage_reductions: added updated_at, demographic_reports: created_at NOT NULL). All timestamp columns now use consistent created_at/updated_at naming.
Pipeline started for cleanup-3: Cleanup checkpoint after Phase 3 — evaluate tests, lint, docs; apply limited incremental refactoring.

Baseline evaluation: 672 passed, 1 skipped. No eval() violations. No stale old column names outside migration code. Identified 7 files with old-style typing imports (Optional, List, Dict, Tuple, Union) eligible for Python 3.11 modernization.

Pipeline completed for cleanup-3: 672 passed, 1 skipped (unchanged). Applied typing modernization to 7 files: settings.py (Dict->dict), migrations.py (Optional->|None), job_manager.py (Optional->|None), init_workspace.py (Union->|), repository.py (Optional/List->|None/list), registry.py (Tuple/Dict/Optional/List->tuple/dict/|None/list, Callable from collections.abc), demographics.py (Optional/Callable->|None, Callable from collections.abc). All tests green after changes.
Pipeline started for migration-4: Sector column cleanup.
